positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed celestial mandalas pattern featuring stylized lunar cycles, abstract cosmic flora, and geometric constellations. The design must be composed entirely of strong, clean silhouettes with thick, defined lines, suitable for apparel screen printing. Use a limited, contrasting color palette of deep midnight blue, burnt gold, and glowing teal. The composition should be centered and highly scalable, evoking a sense of wonder and ancient geometry. Style: Neo-tribal art combined with psychedelic stained-glass aesthetic. Composition: Radial symmetry, repeating motifs. Lighting: High contrast, glow effect from the central elements.
